languages.text:
The Overseer chooses an ally he sees — and an empty adjacent cell. That ally is considered {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}Screened{/g}. The Cyber-Eagle lands in that cell, automatically provoking TOU Save -{uip|PetsPER|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} against all enemies around it. On a failure, they are pushed for {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} cells.
After that, any ranged attack targeting the {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}Screened{/g} ally from the side of the Cyber-Eagle that should hit is negated by it. The Cyber-Eagle negates {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} attacks in total. After that, it ascends and leaves the battlefield.
Available only if the Cyber-Eagle is {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}Ascended{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The Overseer chooses an ally he sees — and an empty adjacent cell. That ally is considered {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}Screened{/g}. The Cyber-Eagle lands in that cell, automatically provoking TOU Save -{uip|PetsPER|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} against all enemies around it. On a failure, they are pushed for {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} cells.
After that, any ranged attack targeting the {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}Screened{/g} ally from the side of the Cyber-Eagle that should hit is negated by it. The Cyber-Eagle negates {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} attacks in total. After that, it ascends and leaves the battlefield.
Available only if the Cyber-Eagle is {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}Ascended{/g}.

languages.text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} chooses an ally in their {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} and an unoccupied cell adjacent to that ally. The cyber-eagle lands at that cell, losing the {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}soaring{/g} effect, granting that ally {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}screened{/g}, and gaining {uip|PetsAGIBonus|ce847cb6b6074a528eaf4cc4479d4db0} stacks of screening until the end of combat. Enemies adjacent to the ally must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|PetsPER|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} penalty or be {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} cells away.
Once all screening stacks are spent, the cyber-eagle immediately starts {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}soaring{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The Overseer chooses an ally in their line of sight and an unoccupied cell adjacent to that ally. The cyber-eagle lands at that cell, losing the {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}soaring{/g} effect, granting that ally {g|f:302c9af3e79e42d89a94790fc0ae19c7}screened{/g}, and gaining {uip|PetsAGIBonus|ce847cb6b6074a528eaf4cc4479d4db0} stacks of screening until the end of combat. Enemies adjacent to the ally must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|PetsPER|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} penalty or be pushed {uip|PetsAGIBonus|76f19b6b165a4d72b169a673a2f34d90} cells away.
Once all screening stacks are spent, the cyber-eagle immediately starts {g|f:ec56854df2e84ef196a49079a43b5211}soaring{/g}.
